product.description:
Product Details
• Learning to Pick Up and Develop Grasp
• Comes in various shapes such as Hearts and Stars
• Melts in baby’s mouth, not sloppy when eaten
• Live & Active Cultures
• Contains milk

Care Instructions:
• Young children should be able to sit upright and able to swallow on their own when consuming this product
• Recommended for 12 months and above with adult supervision

metaData.Ingredients: Strawberry – Dairy Based Yogurt, Strawberry Flavouring (Sugar, Gelatin, Vegetable Thickening, Food Acid, Approved Colouring), Ro Water
metaData.Key Information:
What’s Freeze-drying?
The Freeze Drying process extracts water, giving fruits a crunchy texture whilst preserving their natural flavours and nutritional value, can be eaten as a healthy snack or used as an addition to smoothies, cereals and baking.

A freeze dried is the latest method of food preservation, the same one chosen by NASA in preparing food for the astronauts. This method can keep the nutrition at its utmost by dehydrating fruits and make solid.
metaData.SAP Product Name: WEL.B FREEZE DRIED YOGURT MELTS STRAWBERRY 20G
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place

What’s Freeze-drying?
The Freeze Drying process extracts water, giving fruits a crunchy texture whilst preserving their natural flavours and nutritional value, can be eaten as a healthy snack or used as an addition to smoothies, cereals and baking.

A freeze dried is the latest method of food preservation, the same one chosen by NASA in preparing food for the astronauts. This method can keep the nutrition at its utmost by dehydrating fruits and make solid.

metaData.Ingredients:
Rice, Soyabean, Sugar, Skimmed Milk Powder (Cow’s Milk), Vegetable Oils (Palm Olein, Rapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Sunflower Oil), Apple Powder (Glucose, Apple Juice Concentrate), Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Sodium Phosphate, Ferric Pyrophosphate, Zinc Sulphate, Potassium Iodide), Banana, Maltodextrin, Soya Lecithin, Fish Oil Powder, Vitamins (C,E, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, B2, B1, B6, A, Folic Acid, Biotin, D3, B12), Orange Powder (Orange Juice, Glucose), Corn Starch, Taurine, Vanillin, Bifidobacterium Lactis Culture
• Contains permitted flavouring
• All additives are of plant or synthetic origin
• May contain traces of gluten
metaData.Key Information:
• For babies from 6 months onwards
• Contains zinc, vitamins A, C and B1, and iodine
• Made with baby grade ingredients that are grown specially for babies
• It introduces the delicious taste of apples, bananas and oranges, and provides the fibre that babies need for weaning

metaData.Preparation:
• To Prepare:
1. Pour 150ml of lukewarm water into baby's bowl
2. Add 50g or 5 tablespoons of Nestle Cerelac
3. Stir until the cereal is smooth and feed with clean spoon
• Important:
1. Wash hands before preparing baby's food
2. Make sure all utensils are thoroughly clean, just before preparing the cereal
3. Do not keep unfinished portion
4. Contains viable bacteria, follow storage instructions
5. Not intended for bottlefeeding
metaData.SAP Product Name: NESTLE CERELAC CEREAL WITH MILK - RICE & MIXED FRUITS (AFTER 6 MTHS) 250G

product.name: Nestle Cerelac Cereal - Rice & Mixed Fruits (6 Months)

metaData.Ingredients:
Whole Grain Oat Flour, and Oat Flour (Contains Wheat), Banana Flakes, Strawberry Flavored Bits (Corn Starch, Strawberry Puree, Strawberry Juice Concentrate), Natural Strawberry Flavor. Vitamins and Minerals: Calcium Carbonate, Potassium Phosphate, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Iron (Electrolytic), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide, Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin), Vitamin B1 (Thiamin Mononitrate), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Vitamin B12, Folic Acid
• Contains: Wheat
metaData.Key Information:
• Added texture to help babies learn to chew and mash
• Calcium for strong bones and teeth
• Iron for brain development
metaData.Preparation:
• Easy to Mix Directions:
1. Pour out 1/4 cup of cereal in bowl
2. For best results, stir in 1/4 cup liquid (breastmilk, infant formula, water or juice)
3. For a thinner texture, stir in 1/3 cup liquid
4. For toddler, mix with milk for children over 1 year of age
5. Serve as is or warm in the microwave
6. Always test temperature before feeding
7. Discard any unfed cereal
• Microwave Guidelines for Heating:
1. Warm unheated liquid at medium (50% power) 15-30 seconds
2. Mix heated liquid with cereal
3. Stir to even out temperature
4. Test temperature before feeding
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Brown Jasmine Rice, Corn Flour, Rice Bran Oil, Strawberry Powder
metaData.Key Information:
• All Natural
• No added sugar, salt or preservatives
• Suitable for babies 9 months+
• Comes in a resealable pack, the perfect on-the-go snack for your little one!
metaData.Preparation: For babies who just started solids, mix puffs with milk to make it softer. Also great to serve as a healthy snack or breakfast for toddlers, kids and even adults.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a dry place at room temperature. Once opened, reseal tightly and use within 7 days for maximum freshness.

product.name: Little Blossom Organic Brown Rice Puffs - Strawberry

Whole Wheat Flour, Whole Grain Oat Flour, Sugar, Oat Flour, Rice Flour, Banana Flakes, Strawberry Flavored Bits (Cornstarch, Strawberry Puree, Strawberry Juice Concentrate), Dried Apples, Whole Grain Rye Flour, Pearled Barley Flour, Red Beet Juice Powder (Color), Natural Apple Flavor. Vitamins and Minerals: Calcium Carbonate, Potassium Phosphate, Magnesium Oxide, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Iron (Electrolytic), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E (Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate), Niacinamide, Vitamin A Palmitate, Vitamin D3, Vitamin B1 (Thiamin Mononitrate), Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Vitamin B12, Folic Acid

metaData.Preparation:
• Easy to Mix Directions:
1. Pour out 1/4 cup of cereal in bowl
2. For best results, stir in 1/4 cup liquid (breastmilk, infant formula, water or juice)
3. For a thinner texture, stir in 1/3 cup liquid
4. For toddler, mix with milk for children over 1 year of age
5. Serve as is or warm in the microwave
6. Always test temperature before feeding
7. Discard any unfed cereal
• Microwave Guidelines for Heating:
1. Warm unheated liquid at medium (50% power) 15-30 seconds
2. Mix heated liquid with cereal
3. Stir to even out temperature
4. Test temperature before feeding

Our puffs are:
